message:
refactor(tcp): simplify clear_waiter_on_drop control flow

Refactor clear_waiter_on_drop() to avoid destructuring the SplitIoState
and instead access fields directly through the guard. Consolidates
the registration cleanup logic into a single clear_registration flag
with a unified drop path at the end, eliminating multiple early returns.

Functionally equivalent — same behavior for all code paths (empty
interest drops registration, set_interest/update_waker failure drops
registration, success narrows interest). The explicit drop(guard)
at the end makes the lock release point visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
